title: New species of Tropicoporus from India with a key to Afro-Asian species
author: Gunaseelan, Sugantha
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 7 Tropicoporus pseudoindicus (MUBL1085 holotype) A basidiomata (Holotype) B pore surface C cross-section of basidiome (arrows indicating stratified tube layers and duplex context with black line) D hymenial setae E–H basidiospores: E basidiospores in water F basidiospores in KOHG basidiospores in cotton blue H basidiospores in Melzer's reagent. Scale bars: 1 cm (A–C); 5 µm (D–H).
